description: User-generated content featuring authentic product reviews and demonstrations by influencers or community members, combining English and Arabic commentary to showcase product benefits and usage.
structural_recipe: Feature a named influencer or community member testing/using a beauty product in authentic setting. Lead with influencer mention and product name in English, highlighting key benefits (hydration, shine, sparkle). Include Arabic translation or transliteration of product name. Structure as: @mention + product + benefit keywords + emoji accent + Arabic mirror text.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences trust peer recommendations and authentic testimonials over direct brand claims. Bilingual presentation (English-Arabic) normalizes the product within local context while maintaining aspirational English branding. Named influencer creates social proof and encourages followers to seek same product. Emoji use adds contemporary, relatable tone that resonates with younger Saudi demographics.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure influencer/reviewer is appropriately modest in appearance and behavior per Saudi cultural standards
Arabic text should be grammatically correct and natural—poor translations undermine credibility
Avoid overstated health claims without regulatory support in Saudi market
Verify influencer aligns with brand values and has authentic Saudi audience connection
cultural_constraints: Reviewer should maintain modest presentation standards
Product benefits should emphasize halal/safe ingredients when applicable
Bilingual execution required for authentic local resonance
